Operation 'create_image' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, unclear_purpose, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about the core purpose (HTML/CSS to image conversion), input options (markup or URL), output format and metadata, and authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Generate image from HTML/CSS or URL
data.description_suggestion: Generates an image from provided HTML/CSS content or a URL. Accepts either raw HTML/CSS markup or a URL as input. Returns the generated image in the specified format (PNG, JPEG, etc.) along with metadata including image ID, dimensions, and creation timestamp. Requires authentication via BasicAuth.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about the core purpose (HTML/CSS to image conversion), input options (markup or URL), output format and metadata, and authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'get_image' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks specificity about retrieval by ID. Description is empty. Enhanced to clarify that this retrieves previously generated images, specify the required image_id parameter, explain what metadata is returned, and note authentication requirement for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a previously generated image by its unique image ID. Returns the image file in its original format along with metadata including dimensions, creation date, and source information. Requires the image_id path parameter. Requires authentication via BasicAuth.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about retrieval by ID. Description is empty. Enhanced to clarify that this retrieves previously generated images, specify the required image_id parameter, explain what metadata is returned, and note authentication requirement for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'delete_image' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, unclear_purpose, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is slightly better but could be more specific. Description is missing entirely. Added clarity about permanence of deletion, the image_id requirement, confirmation response, and the irreversible nature of the operation. This helps AI agents understand the consequences before executing.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a generated image and its associated metadata from the system. Requires the image_id path parameter identifying the image to delete. Returns confirmation of deletion. This operation is irreversible - deleted images cannot be recovered. Requires authentication via BasicAuth.
data.reasoning: Summary is slightly better but could be more specific. Description is missing entirely. Added clarity about permanence of deletion, the image_id requirement, confirmation response, and the irreversible nature of the operation. This helps AI agents understand the consequences before executing.

message: Operation 'create_batch_images' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, unclear_purpose, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is vague about batch nature and purpose. Description is completely missing. Enhanced to explain batch processing capability, input format (array of specifications), output structure (array of results with status), potential asynchronous behavior, and authentication. This clarifies when to use batch vs. single image creation.

data.description_suggestion: Generates multiple images from HTML/CSS content or URLs in a single batch request. Accepts an array of image specifications, each containing HTML/CSS markup or URL. Returns an array of generated images with their respective IDs, metadata, and status. Batch processing may be asynchronous - check individual image status for completion. Requires authentication via BasicAuth.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about batch nature and purpose. Description is completely missing. Enhanced to explain batch processing capability, input format (array of specifications), output structure (array of results with status), potential asynchronous behavior, and authentication. This clarifies when to use batch vs. single image creation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes multiple generated images in a single batch request. Accepts an array of image IDs to delete. Returns confirmation of deletion with status for each image (success or failure). This operation is irreversible - deleted images cannot be recovered. Requires authentication via BasicAuth.

data.summary_suggestion: List all generated images with pagination

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves current usage statistics and quota information for the authenticated account. Requires authentication via BasicAuth.
